title: The Shifting Line Between CSS States and JavaScript Events
summary:
CSS has always had pseudo-classes that style things when baed on user interactions. Recent features, however, are blurring the line between what CSS "listens" for and how they are alternatives to what Javascript typically listens for.

title: translateZ()
summary:
The translateZ() function moves an element closer to or farther from the user. 
translateZ() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

title: Designing With Uncertainty: How AI Supercharges Probabilistic Thinking
summary: In a world where AI is informing more design choices, it’s easy to mistake predictions for certainties. This article introduces Probabilistic Design, a mindset that allows UX and product teams to accept uncertainty, decipher AI outputs with nuance, and make smart, adaptive decisions.

title: The Impact Of Humanoid Robots On Humanity
summary: We have officially moved past the era of humanoid robots as mere public relations stunts. As they become increasingly lifelike, society may soon face profound social, psychological, and ethical challenges.
